LanguageData.EI_Plant_Flax.label: flax plant
LanguageData.EI_Plant_Flax.description: A fiber crop grown for linen. It matures sooner than cotton, but its harvest must be processed before it can be used as cloth.
LanguageData.EI_RawFlax.label: raw flax
LanguageData.EI_RawFlax.description: Harvested flax stems and fiber ready to be processed into linen.
LanguageData.EI_Linen.label: linen
LanguageData.EI_Linen.description: A light fabric processed from flax fiber. It handles warm weather well, but is less durable and less insulating in the cold than cloth.
LanguageData.EI_LinenTunic.label: linen tunic
LanguageData.EI_LinenTunic.description: A simple, lightweight linen tunic inspired by everyday early medieval Irish clothing. It is comfortable in warm weather but provides little protection from cold or weapons.
